commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: No repair lane is needed because I found no code defect; the remaining action is maintainer handling of proof and merge-risk acceptance.; Cleared: The diff changes TypeScript session/fallback plumbing, tests, and changelog only; I found no new dependency, workflow, secret, permission, download, or package-resolution surface. (sha=e8520902a7d270ad6fbb774f09df03f12f158624)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds per-fallback persistence latches and session-guard plumbing so queued user messages and assistant error stubs are persisted once across embedded fallback retries, with regression coverage and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main re-enters embedded fallback candidates with the same queued transcript prompt and no cross-candidate persistence latch; I verified the failing shape from source, not by running a live provider reproduction.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed because I found no code defect; the remaining action is maintainer handling of proof and merge-risk acceptance.

target.title: fix(followup): stop model-fallback retries duplicating queued user messages and assistant error stubs
target.body:
## Summary

- Keep queued follow-up user-message persistence idempotent across embedded model-fallback retries.
- Suppress repeated assistant error stubs only after the session guard actually persists one for this fallback run.
- Plumb `onAssistantErrorMessagePersisted` through the embedded runner params, attempt loop, and session guard wrapper.
- Add regression coverage for embedded-to-embedded retries and CLI-to-embedded fallback.

## Why

Each model-fallback candidate re-enters the embedded runner with the same queued transcript prompt. Once one candidate has written the queued user message, later candidates must not write it again. Failed embedded candidates can also write an assistant `stopReason="error"` separator; later embedded candidates should suppress that only after a real persisted assistant error exists.

The important change from the first PR version: this no longer uses a raw fallback-candidate counter. The assistant-error latch flips from `onAssistantErrorMessagePersisted`, which fires after `appendMessageAndCacheTranscriptSeq` succeeds. That keeps CLI or otherwise non-persisting failures from suppressing the first embedded assistant error separator.

Closes #83404

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: queued follow-up user messages and per-candidate assistant error stubs could be duplicated in the session JSONL on model-fallback retry, producing consecutive same-role entries that providers reject.

Real environment tested: focused regression tests against the real `SessionManager` path and the production follow-up/main reply fallback callers in this checkout.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

    node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/session-tool-result-guard.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/followup-runner.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts
    git diff --check
    pnpm build
    pnpm check:changed
    AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local

Evidence after fix: focused tests passed with `Test Files 3 passed (3)` and `Tests 180 passed (180)`. `pnpm build` passed. `pnpm check:changed` passed in Blacksmith Testbox run `tbx_01krxmhv2jgka5kx790m4x9jpx`, GitHub run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26036701431. Autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

Observed result after fix: follow-up and main reply fallback candidates reuse persisted queued-user and assistant-error state instead of appending duplicate same-role transcript entries. CLI-to-embedded fallback still lets the first embedded candidate persist its assistant error separator because the latch is event-based, not attempt-index-based.

What was not tested: live provider reproduction against the reporter's exact OpenRouter/Anthropic account configuration.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/session-tool-result-guard.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/followup-runner.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm build`
- `pnpm check:changed` (`tbx_01krxmhv2jgka5kx790m4x9jpx`)
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
target.author: yetval
